note: OWNER-CONTROLLED. This is the ONLY place an eligibility verdict may live. No machine writes to this file. Every decision is the owner's editorial call against GROW.md, citing the evidence IDs (from eligibility-evidence.json) it rests on. Anything not decided here stays `review` — no regex, species rule, signal, or agent recommendation can move a performance out of review.

evidence_ids: ids from that performance's dossier that support the call
